generated.findings: The heart and lungs are normal in size and contour. Both lungs are clear and expanded. No mediastinal widening, pleural effusion, or pneumothorax.
generated.impression: No active disease. No acute cardiopulmonary abnormalities.

ground_truth.findings: The heart and mediastinum are unremarkable. The lungs are clear without infiltrate. There is no effusion or pneumothorax. Degenerative disease of multiple midthoracic vertebral bodies.
